This is a line-item field on the carrier claim (non-DMERC) and is used for both allowed and denied 
services. 
SHORT NAME: MTUS_CNT 
LONG NAME: CARR_LINE_MTUS_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
11 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
For anesthesia (MTUS indicator = 2) this field should be reported in time unit intervals, e.g., 15-minute 
intervals or fraction thereof.
